strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in event-driven systems and microservices architecture
Demonstrated ability to scale engineering teams and develop technical leadership
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and agentic AI applications
No clear evidence of experience with foundation models and LLM infrastructure
Limited experience in high-stakes commercial environments with financial consequences
response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development and technical leadership, with experience in event-driven systems and AI-agent infrastructure. However, there are concerns about the lack of direct experience in fintech and agentic AI applications.
